allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Add executive-level KPIs and professional design to admin pages

Implemented comprehensive improvements to the admin area with CEO-focused
metrics and professional UI design:

## New Features
- Created reusable StatsCard component with 6 color schemes
- Added executive KPIs to all main admin pages
- Implemented real-time metric calculations

## Pages Enhanced
- Students (Alunos): 4 KPIs - Total, Active, New This Month, Retention Rate
- Teachers (Professores): 4 KPIs - Total, Active, Hours Taught, Avg Rating
- Classes (Turmas): 4 KPIs - Total, Students, Avg per Class, Occupancy Rate
- Instruments: 4 KPIs - Total Inventory, Active, Families, Diversity

## Design Improvements
- Standardized table layouts with purple executive theme
- Professional cards with subtle gradients and animations
- Trend indicators with up/down arrows and percentages
- Consistent color palette across all admin pages
- Improved hover states and transitions

## Technical Details
- Component: StatsCard with StatsGrid wrapper
- Animations: Framer Motion for smooth transitions
- Responsive: All KPIs adapt to mobile/tablet/desktop
- Type-safe: Full TypeScript support

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Add view toggle and functional pagination to admin pages

Implemented revolutionary UI improvements for CEO-level admin experience:

## New Components
- **ViewToggle**: Switch between Table/Cards/Grid views with localStorage persistence
- **Pagination**: Fully functional pagination with page numbers, items per page selector
- **usePagination Hook**: Custom hook for easy pagination state management

## Alunos Page Enhancements
- 3 view modes: Table (list), Cards (detailed), Grid (compact)
- Real pagination with 10/25/50/100 items per page options
- Beautiful card designs with gradients and animations
- Grid view for quick visual scanning
- Pagination works across all 3 view modes

## Design Features
- Smooth Framer Motion animations
- Professional purple executive theme
- Responsive grids (1/2/3/4/5 columns based on breakpoint)
- Hover effects and transitions
- Mobile-optimized pagination controls

## Technical Implementation
- ViewToggle with 3 modes stored in localStorage
- Pagination with ellipsis for large page counts
- First/Previous/Next/Last page controls
- Dynamic items per page with instant recalculation
- Paginated data properly split across views

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
